---
title: "Dongwook Kim Wins Huff Graduate Fellowship"
description: "Dongwook Kim received the Karen and John Huff Graduate Fellowship in Civil and Environmental Engineering at Rice."
categories: Congratulations
date: 2025-04-30
---

Congratulations to [Dongwook Kim](../../people/grad-students/dongwook-kim.qmd), recipient of the **Karen and John Huff Graduate Fellowship in Civil and Environmental Engineering** at Rice!
The Huff Fellowship recognizes outstanding graduate students in CEVE.

Dongwook joined the lab in Fall 2024 and is co-advised with [Avi Gori](https://gori.blogs.rice.edu/).
His research uses synthetic aperture radar (SAR) and deep learning to map flood extents in urban and rural environments, contributing to ongoing work on flood hazard characterization in rural Texas.

Well-deserved, Dongwook!
